/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/g++  -fPIC -D_LANGUAGE_C_PLUS_PLUS  -O0 -g -D_DEBUG -DTARG_MIPS -shared -Wl,-soname,ipl.so -o ../../lib/mips/ipl.so CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/loop_info.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_main.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_bread_write.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_summary_print.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_summarize_util.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_linex.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_array_bread_write.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_tlog.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_outline.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/init.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_elfsym.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/local/ipl_reorder.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/lno/lwn_util.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/lno/access_vector.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/lno/if_info.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/lno/lno_bv.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/com/ipa_section.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/com/ipa_section_main.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/com/ipa_section_print.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/com/ipl_lno_util.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/com/reshape.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/com/wb_summary.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/com/wb_ipl_summary.cxx.o CMakeFiles/ipl-mips.dir/__/be/com/ipa_cost_util.cxx.o
